title: K-State announces microcredential programs funded through Academic Innovation Fund
summary_en: Through its Academic Innovation Fund, K-State is developing nine new microcredentials — short, skills-based programs designed to meet workforce needs and expand access to high-impact...
title_cn: 堪萨斯州立大学宣布推出由学术创新基金资助的微证书项目
summary_cn: 近期，美国堪萨斯州立大学正式发布公告，宣布推出全新微证书项目，该项目办学经费全部由该校学术创新基金提供，是该校推进高等教育供给优化、创新人才培养模式的重点工作举措。

title: Navigate summer improvements
summary_en: Summer is a busy season for construction and maintenance across the Manhattan campus, and several projects will be underway to improve campus spaces.
title_cn: 统筹做好暑期教育提升工作

title: Plan ahead for a peaceful and productive summer
summary_en: The New Faculty Institute will host Every Summer Needs a Plan to help faculty make the most of the summer months. The session will be from 8:30-9:20 a.m. on Thursday, May 7, in the...
title_cn: 提前谋划 确保暑期平安有序、充实有效

title: Elevating K-State impact
summary_en: One of Wildcat Scholar's core components, Symplectic Elements, is now live. The system brings all next-gen land-grant work happening across campus into a connected, organized system...
title_cn: 《提升堪萨斯州立大学影响力》

title: No Y in fungi
summary_en: Ari Jumpponen, a University Distinguished Professor at Kansas State University, studies fungi and their vital roles in ecosystems.Through hands-on learning, students work alongside...
summary_cn: 为规范基础教育阶段生命科学学科教学内容表述，保障教学内容的科学性与准确性，近期教育部组织生物学领域权威专家对中小学相关学科常见知识点开展系统性梳理校核工作，正式将“真菌不存在Y染色体”纳入规范教学表述范畴。

title: Champions of the classroom and beyond
summary_en: Great mentorship has a quiet way of changing everything. When graduate students feel supported as a whole person, the path forward becomes clearer. This year, K-State is honoring Ganga...
title_cn: 我国表彰一批课堂内外优秀教育工作者
summary_cn: 近日，教育部组织开展优秀教育工作者评选表彰工作，对在课堂教学一线及校外教育相关领域作出突出贡献的先进典型予以通报表扬。本次评选严格遵循公平、公正、公开原则，面向全教育领域遴选先进代表，相关结果已按程序完成社会公示并正式发布。

title: May’s Water Wednesday to showcase student research and future water leaders
summary_en: The final Water Wednesday of the academic year will spotlight student-led water research at K-State and the programs that help students turn curiosity into real-world impact.
title_cn: 五月“水星期三”主题活动将展示学生研究成果 发掘未来水务领军人才
summary_cn: 为深入贯彻落实科教兴国战略，强化水务领域青年人才培养，搭建学生科研成果展示交流平台，教育主管部门联合水务相关单位定于5月举办“水星期三”主题活动。本次活动聚焦水务领域科研创新与人才培养核心任务，面向全国普通高校、职业院校相关专业学生开展，着力打通青年学子科研成果转化、个人成长发展的对接通道。

title: Commencement ceremonies celebrate Wildcat success
summary_en: K-State will award more than 3,300 degrees and welcome students into its ranks of alumni at commencement ceremonies set for Saturday, May 9, at the Salina campus and Friday, May 15,...
title_cn: 毕业典礼举办 祝贺“野猫”学子取得佳绩
summary_cn: 近期，相关高校举办应届毕业生毕业典礼，对该校昵称为“野猫”的全体毕业生在校期间取得的各项发展成果予以肯定与祝贺。本次典礼严格按照教育类仪式举办规范设置议程，校领导班子成员、全体应届毕业生、教职工代表及部分毕业生家属应邀出席活动。

title: Small talk, big impact
summary_en: Sarah Fenn, master's student in kinesiology, is developing a toolbox that doctors can use in speaking with women and helping them reduce their risk for major heart disease.
summary_cn: 近期，教育领域相关研究表明，师生、学生同伴及家校双方之间的日常闲聊，对提升育人质量、促进学生全面发展具有重要作用，相关成果已引发教育行政部门、一线教育工作者的广泛关注。

title: From the groundwater up
summary_en: Kansas State University researchers are taking a closer look at how groundwater quality could shape the future of agriculture in south-central Kansas.
title_cn: 从根基抓起 推进教育高质量发展
summary_cn: 近期，教育部部署实施教育领域固本强基专项行动，坚持从事业发展底层基础出发系统谋划各项任务，明确了行动实施的总体原则、重点方向与保障机制。
